name: obsidian-nexus
description: Semantic Knowledge Graph & Bidirectional Links for Obsidian

scripts.build: tsc -noEmit && node esbuild.config.mjs production && cp manifest.json styles.css dist/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: Kharizma & Latreia
